_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of computer based training and e-learning services.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, instructional design methods, knowledge retention research, and blended learning delivery models.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-017 (AI, cosine: 0.435), AI-T-011 (AI, cosine: 0.413).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.317). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, learning]. DCWF-only terms [based, computer, services, training] vs WIDAI-only terms [adult, blended, delivery, design, instructional, methods] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.899 (P=0.917, R=0.882). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.0%). "Knowledge of computer based training and e-learning services." and "Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, in" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.472 > STS 0.317 (gap +0.155). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, learning] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, learning]. DCWF-only: [based, computer, services, training]. WIDAI-only: [adult, blended, delivery, design, instructional, methods].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.155 with low STS 0.317. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
